channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Property Listings
channel.description: Live Zimbabwe property listings with branded hybrid cards — photo on top, price and specs on the brand strip. One item per active listing for the Mutapa Times properties autolist.

item.title: USD 355,000 — An Exclusive Upmarket Townhouse Development! (Borrowdale Brooke, Harare North)
item.description: USD 355,000 — Borrowdale Brooke, Harare North. 3 beds, 2 baths. An Exclusive Upmarket Townhouse Development!. Browse all listings at mutapatimes.com/property #Zimbabwe #Property #ZimbabweProperty #RealEstate #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Property.co.zw
